session.user:
Run the following command from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results:
make exec-reference-check
Report pass or fail.
session.assistant: I'll run the command and report the results.
session.tool_result: uv run erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs --check OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
session.assistant: PASSED: The exec-reference-check passed successfully. The `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` documentation file is up to date with the current exec reference.
